title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at New India Assurance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at New India Assurance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, New India Assurance in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About New India Assurance:
New India Assurance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance!
